name: Mine
notes: Deliberately costs Stone (not Steel) to build/upgrade, cross-wired with Quarry costing Steel, to avoid a chicken-and-egg problem where a base's first Mine could never be paid for out of zero starting Steel — Stone is available turn one via the seeded Quarry (see game-design/03-resources.md). Ticks automatically every 5s resource tick, no player input (Resource category). HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
